extension_name.description: Name of the extension. The maximum length is 45 characters.

extension_description.message: Показывает объявленные RSS/Atom-каналы на текущей странице в контекстном меню, вызываемом правой кнопкой мыши.
extension_description.description: A short description of the extension. The maximum length is 132 characters.

developer_name.description: The name of the extension's developer. Leave it untranslated if you are unsure of the correct spelling in the localization language.
